response.global_analysis: The video segment consists of conversational dialogue between VTuber Kobo Kanaeru and guest Arsy Widianto, followed by Kobo's closing remarks and credits. The Reference JSON correctly identifies the absence of full vocal musical performances, only noting incidental music and a brief 'Say Dada' snippet. I have transcribed the conversational speech and synchronized it to the audio waveform, discarding the irrelevant 'contains_vocal_music' constraints since the primary audio is speech.

subtitles.original: Pasti akan ada sih per... per...
subtitles.english: There will definitely be some... some...

subtitles.original: Wow! Wow! Apakah?
subtitles.english: Wow! Wow! Is it?

subtitles.original: Aoyama Tadashi akan tergantikan oleh Yamakun?
subtitles.english: Will Aoyama Tadashi be replaced by Yamakun?

subtitles.original: Anyway, makasih advice-nya.
subtitles.english: Anyway, thanks for the advice.

subtitles.original: Banyak banget pelajaran yang bisa diambil dari stream ini.
subtitles.english: There are so many lessons to be learned from this stream.

subtitles.original: Terima kasih ya, Bang Arsy Widianto-kun.
subtitles.english: Thank you, Bang Arsy Widianto-kun.

subtitles.original: Aku juga berterima kasih banget. Aku happy banget.
subtitles.english: I'm also very grateful. I'm so happy.

subtitles.original: Jadi, aku lanjut ya.
subtitles.english: So, I'll be going now.

subtitles.original: Ni nggak nggak ilfeel kan diundang ama anime ya?
subtitles.english: You're not turned off by being invited by an anime, right?

subtitles.original: Enggak lah.
subtitles.english: No way.

subtitles.original: Enggak ya?
subtitles.english: Really?

subtitles.original: Ya kalau buat kamu mah apa sih yang enggak.
subtitles.english: For you, I'd do anything.

subtitles.original: Udahlah, tenang aja.
subtitles.english: Don't worry about it.

subtitles.original: Eh ayo kita kita kayak... Coba coba di-pet-pet bisa nggak kita?
subtitles.english: Hey, let's... Can you try to give me head pats?

subtitles.original: Kok kayaknya pendek banget sih aku?
subtitles.english: Why do I look so short?

subtitles.original: Kayaknya aku nggak sependek ini deh harusnya. Ha? Ha?
subtitles.english: I shouldn't be this short. Huh? Huh?

subtitles.original: Ha? Ha? Ha? Buset, sombongnya! Parah banget.
subtitles.english: Huh? Huh? Huh? Geez, how arrogant! That's too much.

subtitles.original: Eh kita kita fist bump fist bump fist bump.
subtitles.english: Hey, let's do a fist bump.

subtitles.original: Oke, fist bump.
subtitles.english: Okay, fist bump.

subtitles.original: High five! High five!
subtitles.english: High five! High five!

subtitles.original: Ya udah deh.
subtitles.english: Alright then.

subtitles.original: Oke, baiklah. Terima kasih banyak sekali lagi, Kobo. Makasih banget.
subtitles.english: Okay, then. Thank you so much once again, Kobo. Thanks a lot.

subtitles.original: Jangan ke mana-mana, ikut ini nggak? Makan-makan dulu kita.
subtitles.english: Don't go yet, want to join? Let's go eat first.

subtitles.original: Boleh. Mau ke mana? Mau makan apa? Ayo.
subtitles.english: Sure. Where to? What do you want to eat? Let's go.

subtitles.original: Ih buset, sok soft-spoken gini buset guys! Aaa!
subtitles.english: Geez, he's acting all soft-spoken! Aaa!

subtitles.original: Ayo ayo, ya udah nanti di belakang ya.
subtitles.english: Come on, okay, let's meet backstage then.

subtitles.original: Ya udah, oke.
subtitles.english: Alright, okay.

subtitles.original: Ya udah, aku lanjut ya.
subtitles.english: Okay, I'll head out.

subtitles.original: Istirahat dulu ya?
subtitles.english: Taking a break?

subtitles.original: Iya. Kamu jangan capek-capek juga ya.
subtitles.english: Yeah. You don't overwork yourself either.

subtitles.original: Oke, iya iya. Makasih. Dah.
subtitles.english: Okay, yeah, thanks. Bye.

subtitles.original: Arigato. Dah dah.
subtitles.english: Thanks. Bye bye.

subtitles.original: Mata ne. Dah.
subtitles.english: See you. Bye.

subtitles.original: Eh iya Cirus-ga dah. Iya dianterin sana.
subtitles.english: Oh right, bye Cirus. Yes, take him there.

subtitles.original: もう終わりましたかな？
subtitles.english: Is it already over?

subtitles.original: Hee, yattai!
subtitles.english: Yay, I did it!

subtitles.original: Iya, yukkuri shitai.
subtitles.english: Yeah, I want to take it slow.

subtitles.original: Jadi gimana surprise-nya? Kalian suka nggak?
subtitles.english: So, how was the surprise? Did you guys like it?

subtitles.original: Eh! Cirus!
subtitles.english: Eh! Cirus!

subtitles.original: Cirus, ini dia yang akan kita obrol nanti guys!
subtitles.english: Cirus, this is what we'll talk about later, guys!

subtitles.original: Kawaii, kamu nanti bakal dijual banyak ya Cirus ya?
subtitles.english: So cute, you'll be sold a lot, right Cirus?

subtitles.original: You will be... You will be sold...
subtitles.english: You will be... You will be sold...

subtitles.original: by many many customers, so...
subtitles.english: by many many customers, so...

subtitles.original: please be a good Cirus. Hehe.
subtitles.english: please be a good Cirus. Hehe.

subtitles.original: Kalau gitu kita beneran closing-nya!
subtitles.english: Then, let's really do the closing!

subtitles.original: Semoga kalian seneng sama surprise itu,
subtitles.english: I hope you liked that surprise,

subtitles.original: performance tadi, eh!
subtitles.english: and the performance just now!

subtitles.original: Bokoboko, Kobo Kanaeru at your service.
subtitles.english: Bokoboko, Kobo Kanaeru at your service.

subtitles.original: Let me be your sun to shine your day. Ehe!
subtitles.english: Let me be your sun to shine your day. Ehe!

subtitles.original: Bye bye semuanya! Terima kasih! Bye bye!
subtitles.english: Bye bye everyone! Thank you! Bye bye!

subtitles.original: Chape.
subtitles.english: I'm tired.

subtitles.original: Chape!
subtitles.english: Tired!

subtitles.original: もう終わりだ！
subtitles.english: It's finally over!

subtitles.original: Say Dada.
subtitles.english: Say Dada.

subtitles.original: Dada!
subtitles.english: Dada!
